name: China Kunda Technology Holdings Limited
summary: China Kunda Technology Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the in-mold decoration and plastic injection parts, and furniture businesses in the People's Republic of China, Europe, and internationally. It is involved in the design, development, and supply of furniture and fittings that includes cabinets, appliances, surfaces, woodwares, decorative products, and other related activities, as well as provides consultancy services. The company also supplies raw materials and machineries; offers moulds products; and provides technical and management services. It primarily serves electronics manufacturers. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
